news.title: A 20-minute pitch wins Indian startup Pronto backing from Lachy Groom
news.summary: The investment comes as Pronto scales to 26,000 daily bookings and the market heads toward a potential $18 billion size.

news.title: Barry Diller trusts Sam Altman. But ‘trust is irrelevant’ as AGI nears, he says.
news.summary: Barry Diller defended OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, while warning that AGI remains an unpredictable force needing guardrails.

news.title: Snap says its $400M deal with Perplexity ‘amicably ended’
news.summary: The deal, announced last November, would have seen Perplexity's AI search engine integrated directly into Snapchat.

news.title: Is xAI a neocloud now?
news.summary: xAI's real business may be more about building data centers than training AI models.

news.title: Insurance startup Corgi hits $1.3B valuation 4 months after its Series A
news.summary: Corgi announced on Wednesday a $160 million Series B, led by TCV, valuing the startup at $1.3 billion.

news.title: SpaceX is starting to move on from the world's most successful rocket
news.summary: Vandenberg Space Force Base in California is set to become SpaceX's busiest launch site—for now.

news.summary: Deal follows others with Microsoft, Amazon, and more.

news.title: TSMC taps wind power as AI chip demand soars, Taiwan feels energy crunch
news.summary: TSMC backs renewables during record demand for energy-hungry chip manufacturing.

news.title: Court strikes down FCC anti-discrimination rule opposed by Internet providers
news.summary: Chairman Brendan Carr celebrates FCC court loss in case over Biden-era rule.

news.title: Spooked by Mythos, Trump suddenly realized AI safety testing might be good
news.summary: Trump forced to admit Biden was right on AI safety testing.

news.title: Elon Musk’s Last-Ditch Effort to Control OpenAI: Recruit Sam Altman to Tesla
news.summary: Messages between Shivon Zilis and Tesla executives reveal plans in 2017 to start a rival AI lab, potentially led by Altman or Demis Hassabis.

news.title: A Kid With a Fake Mustache Tricked an Online Age-Verification Tool
news.summary: To stop children from bypassing its age checks, Meta is revamping its age-verification tools with an AI system that analyzes images and videos for “visual cues,” such as height and bone structure.

news.title: Trump’s Team Wants Him to Accept an Iran Deal He’s Already Rejected
news.summary: As chaotic negotiations over the end of the Iran war continue, US negotiators think they have the framework for a deal in place. Now they just have to sell the president on it.

news.title: Anthropic Gets in Bed With SpaceX as the AI Race Turns Weird
news.summary: In an unexpected turn, the two companies signed a deal for Anthropic to use computing resources from Elon Musk’s xAI.

news.title: Using AI for Just 10 Minutes Might Make You Lazy and Dumb, Study Shows
news.summary: New research suggests that reliance on AI assistants can have a negative impact on people’s ability to think and problem solve.
